    @pytest.mark.smoke
    @pytest.mark.regression
    @allure.title("Проверка видимости элементов Investment")
    @allure.description("Тест проверяет, что все элементы на странице Investment видны.")
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("name,testid", [
        ("page_container", "page-primary-market"),
        ("header", "primary-market-header"),
        ("subtitle", "sm-header-subtitle"),
        ("banner_desc", "banner-desc"),
        ("banner_container", "banner-cashback"),
        ("catalog_title", "primary-market-catalog-title"),
        ("tab_all", "tab-status-all"),
        ("tab_open", "tab-status-Open"),
        ("tab_raised", "tab-status-Raised"),
        ("tab_repaid", "tab-status-Repaid"),
        ("tab_coming_soon", "tab-status-Coming soon"),
        ("tab_not_raised", "tab-status-Not Raised"),
        ("filter_countries", "filter-countries"),
        ("filter_sectors", "filter-sectors"),
        ("filter_rating", "filter-rating"),
        ("filter_rate", "filter-rate"),
        ("filter_term", "filter-term"),
        ("toolbar_right", "toolbar-right"),
        ("toggle_view", "button-toggle-view")
    ])
    def test_investment_elements_visible(investment_page_visible_test: InvestmentPage, name, testid):
        allure.dynamic.title(f"Проверка видимости: {name}")
        investment_page_visible_test.wait_for_component("page-primary-market")
